title: Eloquent JavaScript, 3rd Edition
author: Marijn Haverbeke
description: A modern, deep-dive introduction to programming, focusing on JavaScript and web browsers.

title: You Don't Know JS Yet: Get Started
author: Kyle Simpson
description: An in-depth exploration of the core mechanisms of the JavaScript language.

title: Hands-On Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn, Keras, and TensorFlow
author: Aurélien Géron
description: A practical guide to building intelligent systems using popular machine learning frameworks.

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
author: Martin Kleppmann
description: The definitive guide to the concepts and architecture of modern scalable data systems.

title: Clean Architecture
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A craftsman's guide to software structure and design for building robust applications.
